final:
module counter_3bit (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [2:0] out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      out <= 3'b0;
    end else begin
      out <= out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
